title: stelis coriifolia
intro: Stelis coriifolia, also known as the Coral Root or Coralroot, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Stelis coriifolia are attributed to its root, which contains various alkaloids, including chrysogine and chrysogenine, with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of the plant are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Stelis coriifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used for medicinal purposes, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
